items.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note
items.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) stood at $204.31, denoting a -1.47% move from the preceding trading day.

items.title: Flu Season's Here—This Dividend-Payer Controls the Shot Market
items.description: With flu season in full swing, drugmakers are hoping for a short-term tailwind after a lackluster 2025. Sanofi could be the winning ticket.
